title: Width (u_width)
text: Width (u_width) Widget property that defines the width of the displayed image in a static server page. It sets the width attribute of the tag in the HTML layout. Description The width attribute overrides the original width of the image, causing the image to be scaled to the new width. The value can be expressed as a number of pixels, or as a percentage of the original image width. To specify a percentage, put a percent sign (%) after the value, otherwise the value is interpreted in pixels. The original image is scaled to the new width, rather than cropped. Applies to Image (USP) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
